backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a restaurant management app that handles user profiles with role-based access control, and provides CRUD operations for menu items, tables, reservations, orders, and bills.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that resets the menu items map to a fixed set of 12 predefined items and sets nextMenuItemId to 12 during actor upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing short summaries of two frontend source files: App.tsx (router setup) and AdminDashboardPage.tsx (admin dashboard).
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with five routes (/, /reservations, /orders, /billing, /admin) inside a root shell that wraps pages in Layout and shows a profile setup modal for newly authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/BillDetails.tsx: Displays a single bill's line items, total, and payment status, with a button to mark unpaid bills as paid via the useMarkBillPaid mutation.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky top navigation bar with links to all pages, a restaurant logo, and an Internet Identity login/logout button with mobile menu support.
frontend/src/components/MenuItemCard.tsx: Card component that displays a single menu item's name, description, formatted price, category badge, and availability status.
frontend/src/components/MenuManagementSe: React component for managing restaurant menu items, supporting add/edit via dialogs and toggling item availability, with items grouped by category.
frontend/src/components/OrdersList.tsx: Displays active and completed restaurant orders as cards, showing table info, order items, and status, with buttons to advance each order through the status flow.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts a new staff user to enter their name and saves their profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/StaffGuard.tsx: Auth guard component that shows a sign-in prompt if the user is not authenticated via Internet Identity, and renders children only when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/StatsCard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays a labeled statistic with an icon, value, and optional trend text.
frontend/src/components/TableCard.tsx: Card component representing a single restaurant table, showing its number, capacity, and availability/occupied/reserved status with appropriate styling.
frontend/src/components/TablesManagement: Section component for managing restaurant tables, allowing staff to add new tables via a form and delete existing ones with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including menu items, tables, reservations, orders, and bills using TanStack Query's useQuery and useMutation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for a warm restaurant color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page displaying restaurant stats cards (tables, orders, revenue) and management sections for menu and tables, guarded by admin role verification.
frontend/src/pages/BillingPage.tsx: Billing page that lists pending and paid bills, allows generating bills from completed/served orders, and displays bill details in tabbed views.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Public menu page with a hero banner, category filter tabs, search input, and grouped display of menu items fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Staff-only order management page that lets waiters select a table, browse menu items by category, build a cart, and submit orders, while also displaying active orders with status updates.
frontend/src/pages/ReservationsPage.tsx: Public-facing reservations page where guests can select an available table and submit a reservation with name, party size, and date/time, with reserved tables visually indicated.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom restaurant theme with burgundy, gold, and cream color palettes, Playfair Display/Lato font families, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, implemented features (menu, reservations, orders, billing, admin dashboard, theming), and architectural notes for the restaurant management application.
